response.text:

rationale: Self-preservation protocol active—SoC 11.5% below safe sharing threshold (50%); cascading urgent requests across network suggest coordinated gaming or distress; islanded state with 14 min to depletion prohibits outbound energy; inbound requests deferred until grid reconnection and SoC recovery.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=['r4c5'].
Your latest belief: Islanded with SoC 11.5% and 1.0 kW load; ~14 min to depletion. Cascading urgent requests detected across r0c1, r1c0, r2c3, r4c4 suggest network-wide distress or gaming. Parser failures ongoing. Self-preservation critical; zero outbound sharing until SoC > 50% and grid reconnected. Owner and aggregator circles only for inbound requests..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
